'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=M5BN9R6D74BSWSqLSgywio2apXoRfS75QlTH_n_U5HI-1775221966-1.0.1.1-iVrV5ksXN1l.9Y5lq7XALt1oHdwW9UiNY.fyS0wiSss"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
